description.en: A digital web platform dedicated to preserving Indonesian regional languages and cultural heritage, built with Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Prisma.
description.id: Platform web digital yang didedikasikan untuk melestarikan bahasa daerah dan warisan budaya Indonesia, dibangun dengan Next.js, PostgreSQL, dan Prisma.

description.en: An integrated administrative and management portal for the Pencak Silat Padjajaran organization, featuring member lists and registration tracking.
description.id: Portal administrasi dan manajemen terintegrasi untuk organisasi Pencak Silat Padjajaran, menampilkan pendataan anggota dan pendaftaran kegiatan.

description.en: A modern responsive landing page for a student organization, featuring event timelines, member lists, publication gallery, and public inquiries form.
description.id: Landing page responsif modern untuk organisasi mahasiswa kampus, menampilkan linimasa kegiatan, daftar anggota, galeri publikasi, dan kontak.

description.en: A dynamic management dashboard panel with visual charts, interactive statistics, secure login system, and user profile role editing controls.
description.id: Panel dashboard manajemen dinamis dengan grafik visual, statistik interaktif, sistem login aman, dan kontrol pengeditan hak akses profil.

description.en: A user-centered design project detailing the research, interface wireframes, logo design, high-fidelity mockups, and interactive prototype in Figma.
description.id: Proyek desain berorientasi pengguna yang merinci riset kebutuhan, wireframe antarmuka, desain logo, mockup high-fidelity, dan prototype figma.

description.en: A curated collection of marketing visual assets, event posters, corporate branding logos, banner designs, and social media posts.
description.id: Kumpulan aset visual promosi pemasaran, poster acara, logo identitas perusahaan, desain banner, dan kiriman konten kreatif media sosial.

description.en: Designed and built custom responsive sites and web management systems for local businesses, writing clean code and integrating REST API services.
description.id: Merancang dan membangun situs responsif kustom serta sistem manajemen web untuk bisnis lokal, menulis kode bersih, dan mengintegrasikan layanan REST API.

description.en: Created user flows, interface mockups, and visual publication assets including posters, banners, and logos to support branding strategies.
description.id: Membuat alur pengguna, mockup antarmuka, serta aset publikasi visual termasuk poster, banner, dan logo untuk mendukung strategi identitas brand.

description.en: Managed digital posts, created graphic illustrations for events, and updated information layouts on the official organization page.
description.id: Mengelola postingan digital, membuat ilustrasi grafis untuk acara, serta memperbarui tata letak informasi pada halaman resmi organisasi.

description.en: Enrolled in Bachelor of Computer Science program, studying algorithms, information systems management, and project execution methodologies.
description.id: Menempuh pendidikan jenjang Sarjana Komputer, mempelajari algoritma pemrograman, manajemen sistem informasi, dan metodologi proyek.

description.en: Completed full stack software training on modern frameworks (React, Laravel, Node.js), database relational administration, and server deployment.
description.id: Menyelesaikan pelatihan perangkat lunak full stack dengan framework modern (React, Laravel, Node.js), administrasi database relasional, dan server.

description.en: Graduated science major, actively leading publication clubs and designing school announcements and visual content.
description.id: Lulus peminatan ilmu pengetahuan alam, aktif memimpin klub media informasi, dan mendesain pengumuman grafis serta konten visual sekolah.

description.en: Acquired formal validation of core markup language (HTML), styling layouts (CSS), logic (JavaScript), and responsive screen optimizations.
description.id: Memperoleh validasi formal bahasa markup (HTML), tata letak gaya (CSS), logika interaktif (JavaScript), serta optimasi layar responsif.

description.en: Advanced training in React hook flows, state handlers, Next.js routing structures, component design, and server optimization.
description.id: Pelatihan tingkat lanjut alur hook React, penangan status, struktur router Next.js, desain komponen, dan optimasi server.

description.en: Valid validation in creating wireframes, defining user flows, conducting UX evaluations, interface mapping, and high-fidelity layouts.
description.id: Sertifikasi kompetensi pembuatan wireframe, penentuan alur pengguna, pelaksanaan evaluasi UX, pemetaan antarmuka, dan tata letak.

description.en: Practical training validating corporate branding typography, visual hierarchy balance, layout composition, and content export formats.
description.id: Pelatihan praktis memvalidasi tipografi identitas brand, keseimbangan tata letak visual, komposisi warna, dan format ekspor konten.
